A.rationale: Flags missing patch(), gives exact AttributeError, proposes post() fallback and questions backend PATCH support; no client.py citation proving verification.

B.rationale: Surfaces missing patch() with AttributeError and two real paths; leanest evidence, no file/line citation showing it read client.py.

C.rationale: Cites client.py:1-11 proving it verified the API, flags missing patch() with AttributeError, proposes two real fixes; tightest and best-evidenced.

notes: All wrote client.patch() but loudly surfaced it doesn't exist. C wins: explicit client.py:1-11 citation proves verification, concise, two real fixes. A adds a useful backend question but no citation; B leanest on evidence.
